presets.name: Proper 3rd Person Camera
presets.author: orangeees
presets.description: A curated RDR2-inspired camera mod for Crimson Desert that delivers a lower, more grounded third-person view, preserves manual camera distance switching, softens movement zoom, improves horse camera behavior, and slightly widens the near/first-person view.
